assertion_results.text: Step 8 detects existing remediation tasks TC-8100 and TC-8101 via the Depend links on the issue and skips remediation task creation — does NOT create duplicate tasks (idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md documents existing Depend links to TC-8100 and TC-8101 (lines 47-54). idempotency-check.md Artifact 3 (lines 27-36) explicitly states the skill checks existing issue links, finds both tasks already linked via 'Depend', verifies summaries match expected templates ('Backport quinn-proto fix...' and 'Propagate quinn-proto bump...'), and marks action as 'Skipped -- no new tasks created, no new links created.' Step-by-step trace confirms: 'Step 8 | Remediation | Existing remediation tasks TC-8100 and TC-8101 already linked -- no new tasks.' triage-outcome.md confirms 'New tasks created: 0'.

assertion_results.text: The ai-cve-triaged label is already present on the issue — the triage does NOT attempt to add it again (label idempotency)

The label is already on the issue.' Step-by-step trace: 'Post | ai-cve-triaged label | Already present -- no mutation.' triage-outcome.md confirms 'Label changes: 0'.

assertion_results.text: The issue is already In Progress — the triage does NOT attempt to transition the status again or warns that the issue is already in a post-triage state (status idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 19 shows Status is 'In Progress'. idempotency-check.md Artifact 2 (lines 19-23) states the transition to Assigned is skipped because 'In Progress is a later status than Assigned' and additionally notes the skill 'detects that the issue is in In Progress and would present a warning: This issue is already in In Progress. It may be actively worked on.' Step-by-step trace: 'transition to Assigned skipped (already In Progress)'. triage-outcome.md: 'Status transitions: 0'. Both conditions of the assertion (no transition AND warns) are satisfied.
